Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}My wife just headed out to Gekkoukan.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 5 13 6 15 103}Well, she won't be gone long. In the meantime, why don't you keep me company?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Are you thirsty? Here, I've got something we can share.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}...Wait, where are the cups? I don't know how to find a thing around here without my wife.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Take a deep breath. You oughta know better than to walk so far at your age...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: *Unused message label. [n]{f 1 5 0}*If this appears, it is a bug.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Tree, tree... Trunk? Oh, I guess we're not playing any word games...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}If you keep running like that, you're going to keel over.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: *Unused message label. [n]{f 1 5 0}*If this appears, it is a bug.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Judging by her reaction, it seems the rumors might be true...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}The persimmon tree we told you about... You know, the one by the walkway at your school.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}My wife heard a rumor that it was going to be cut down, and she almost fainted.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Do you know anything about this, {f 4 2}-chan?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Maybe it's just a rumor after all, then... There's a chance there's no truth to it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}If all this worrying turns out to have been for nothing... Well, that would be quite a "re-leaf"![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I'm worried too. I tried to look into these allegations, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}I think I was "barking up the wrong tree"...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 104 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}If it's not too much trouble, {f 4 2}-chan, could you tell us if you hear any more about it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mitsuko-san seems to be counting on me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we're growing closer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 104 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}I know I made it sound like something very important, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 104 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}Only if it's convenient for you. Tell us if you hear anything about the persimmon tree, all right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I parted with the elderly couple[n]and went back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
